name: @marius-patrik/agents-mono
description: Root aggregator workspace for the agents-mono topology. Exposes the `agents` CLI and validates the `os/agents-manager` TypeScript test surface.

scripts.test: bun test os/agents-manager/test/gitmodules.test.ts os/agents-manager/test/adapters.test.ts os/agents-manager/test/packages.test.ts os/agents-manager/test/data-repos.test.ts os/agents-manager/test/harness-cli.test.ts os/agents-manager/test/secrets.test.ts
scripts.ci: bun run check && bun run test
